name: Yilan County (Taiwan)

colors.symbolism: purity, peace, and a bright future
the lush plain and surrounding mountains of Yilan

description: A white field charged at the centre with a stylised green-and-blue emblem evoking mountains, rivers and the coast of the Lanyang plain, with the county name in stylised characters.
history: Yilan County (Yilan Xian, also spelt Ilan) on Taiwan's northeast coast occupies the Lanyang plain, enclosed by the Central and Snow Mountain ranges. The current county flag bears an emblem representing the plain's distinctive geography of mountains, rivers and coast.

features.symbolism: stylised motif of mountains, rivers and coast representing the Lanyang plain enclosed by the Central and Snow Mountain ranges
